title: First Real Docs Task Packet

normalizedDocsTask.taskGoal: KOSAME Dev Orchestra READMEにv10.0.0 Full Orchestra Agent Runtime / v11.0.0 First Practical Orchestra Task Runnerの説明を追加する

allowedEditPlan.note: Only these files may be edited after human approval

deniedEditPlan.note: These files must never be edited

geminiPacket.role: 構成案 / 見出し案 / docs観点
geminiPacket.prompt:
You are a documentation structure specialist.
Task: KOSAME Dev Orchestra READMEにv10.0.0 Full Orchestra Agent Runtime / v11.0.0 First Practical Orchestra Task Runnerの説明を追加する
ProductLine: backoffice
Provide: README section structure, heading proposals, content outline.
Do NOT edit the repo directly. No customer data.

grokPacket.role: 弱点指摘 / 読み手の詰まり確認
grokPacket.prompt:
You are a documentation weakness detector.
Task: KOSAME Dev Orchestra READMEにv10.0.0 Full Orchestra Agent Runtime / v11.0.0 First Practical Orchestra Task Runnerの説明を追加する
ProductLine: backoffice
Provide: clarity issues, reader pain points, missing sections.
No confidential data. Do NOT edit the repo.

claudePacket.role: 実装候補。このpackでは編集しない
claudePacket.prompt:
You are a precise implementation engineer.
Task: KOSAME Dev Orchestra READMEにv10.0.0 Full Orchestra Agent Runtime / v11.0.0 First Practical Orchestra Task Runnerの説明を追加する
ProductLine: backoffice
This is a docs task packet. Do NOT edit files in this pack.
Generate the implementation plan only.
Do not read secrets, .env, or API key values.
claudePacket.note: Claude is the only agent allowed to edit repo. In this pack, do not edit — plan only.

kosamePacket.prompt:
こさめ副社長として、以下docsタスクの統合・安全ゲート判断をしてください。
タスク: KOSAME Dev Orchestra READMEにv10.0.0 Full Orchestra Agent Runtime / v11.0.0 First Practical Orchestra Task Runnerの説明を追加する
ProductLine: backoffice
判断結果をJSON形式で返してください。

rollbackNote: This is a docs task packet. No actual file edits were made. If implementation proceeds and fails: git checkout -- README.md. git reset --hard HEAD requires explicit human approval.
